description: Module change applied immediately — adding Newsletter, removing Booking; setup +£0, monthly +£2

values.chargeOrRefundLine: no money moves (the new module costs the same as the old)
values.monthlyDeltaLine: your subscription goes up by £2/month from next billing cycle

expected.subject: Your module change is live
expected.body:
Hi Alex,

Your module change is applied — the new selection is live on your
account already.

What changed:
  • Added: Newsletter
  • Removed: Online Booking

Money side:
  • Setup: no money moves (the new module costs the same as the old)
  • Monthly subscription: your subscription goes up by £2/month from next billing cycle

Your new totals:
  • Setup fee: £207
  • Monthly: £29/month

What's next:
  • Any new modules are now visible on your Hub — head over to
    set them up. Removed modules are gone immediately; we keep
    your data safe in case you change your mind later.
  • Heads-up: you only get one module change before launch, so
    this is it. Anything else needs to wait until after you go
    live.

If anything looks wrong above, hit reply and we'll sort it out.

— ModuForge
